author: codex-audit

patch.value: Feature scope: run isolated temporary-project CLI workflows, inspect SDK exports and extension authoring path, exercise calendar commands, validate telemetry behavior and remote stack reachability, then document and fix findings.
Audit latest CLI, SDK, calendar, and telemetry workflows
Coordinate the detailed manual dogfood audit and remediation for the latest pm CLI build.
Audit work is decomposed into tracked tasks/issues/decisions; evidence links changed files and runnable verification; no telemetry secrets are committed or published.

value.author: codex-audit
value.text: Duplicate check before create reused evidence from current audit bootstrap: no open/in-progress items and only closed prior audits matched the requested scope. Parent lineage selected as pm-23me -> this feature because the user requested a new latest-build full audit.

value.author: codex-audit
value.text: Feature owns execution and synthesis; child tasks/issues should capture individual defects or improvements.

message: Create audit feature under 2026-04-30 dogfood epic

value.author: codex-audit
value.text: Audit execution task pm-j16d is closed with evidence. Fixed/closed pm-mwiz (SDK starter migration health warning) and pm-0xhj (date-sensitive context test). Remaining historical tracker hygiene warning set is tracked as open follow-up pm-e0b5; keeping this feature/epic open to preserve that parent lineage.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text:
Dogfood audit (2026-05-01) completed. Findings summary:

FIXED IN THIS SESSION:
- pm-on3q: Telemetry queue oversized-event pruning gap (60MB queue drained to ~0 after fix to pruneExpiredQueueEntries)
- pm-1h7w: Priority --priority error message lacked 0..4 range and semantic labels
- pm-8r2r: pm files --add bare path gave misleading error implying scope is required
- pm-itb0: Calendar --include scheduled alias missing (summary uses 'scheduled', filter required 'events')
- pm-dc2y: pm templates bare command showed empty output instead of template list

WORKING WELL (verified in dogfood):
- All list variants (list, list-all, list-open, list-draft, list-in-progress, list-blocked, list-closed, list-canceled)
- Calendar: deadline, reminder, event, recurring event support all working correctly
- SDK ExtensionApi: comprehensive (14+ register methods, 5 hooks, search providers, vector stores)
- pm context: excellent agent-optimized snapshot
- pm contracts: 56 commands machine-readable
- pm search: hybrid mode working
- Extension scaffold: CommonJS by design, works correctly
- Telemetry endpoint: receiving events at pm-cli.unbrained.dev/v1/events, UUID validation, ok responses

OPEN TRACKING ITEMS:
- pm-ne67: Activity --compact mode for agents
- pm-gmnh: Health ok:false for normal telemetry queue draining
- pm-vg5h: Recurring event unbounded expansion in calendar
- pm-b1pd: Calendar recurring event double-title output redundancy
- pm-g8gj: Verify remote telemetry stack Grafana dashboards

Test suite: 1087 tests at 100% coverage maintained throughout.

patch.value: Dogfood audit completed (2026-05-01). Fixed 5 issues: telemetry queue bloat regression (pm-on3q), priority error message UX (pm-1h7w), files --add error guidance (pm-8r2r), calendar --include scheduled alias (pm-itb0), templates bare command (pm-dc2y). Created tracking items for 5 remaining medium/low priority improvements. All 1087 tests at 100% coverage.
